docs.text: opendendro ¶ Code, example data, and manuscript supplemental materials which accompany OpenDendro Lead Author: Andy Bunn Co-Authors: Ed Cook , Kevin Anchukaitis , Tyson Lee Swetnam Contents ¶ The repository is organized (in the attempt) to enable reproducible research as part of the FAIR data principles . You can (re)run these analyses using your own computer, on commercial cloud, or a data science workbench CyVerse Discovery Environment. Clone the repo to your local or VM: git clone https://github.com/opendendro/opendendro gh repo clone opendendro/opendendro
docs.title: Introduction
